name: Easy Spinach Sauce
recipeIngredient: 1 package frozen spinach, cooked and drained of all water
recipeInstructions:
1. Place the cooked and drained spinach, minced garlic, onion powder, salt, and pepper in a blender.
2. Add half of the vegetable broth to the blender and blend until smooth. If needed, add more vegetable broth gradually for desired consistency (more broth results in a thinner sauce).
3. Transfer the blended mixture back into a saucepan.
4. Heat the sauce until it is hot throughout.
5. Serve over rice or pasta.
